center.name: Caño Negro Wildlife Refuge
center.summary: Caño Negro Wildlife Refuge是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Nicaraguan grackle，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It may be a fairly recent arrival in Costa Rica, where it is found in the Caño Negro area along the Río Frio

links.evidence: It may be a fairly recent arrival in Costa Rica, where it is found in the Caño Negro area along the Río Frio
